name: Diced Up!
short_description: Survive as long as you can in an endless bullet hell with randomized stats and weapons.
detailed_description:
Diced Up! is a top-down bullet hell where you survive as long as you can with randomized stats and weapons. Fight enemies and bosses alone or with your friends to get to higher floors and get a high score. Upgrade your weapons between runs to become stronger.

Key Features

  • Endless Gameplay - Survive as long as you can and go for a high score!
  • Online Multiplayer - Survive with your friends in online co-op.
  • Upgrades - Collect coins and make your weapons stronger.
  • Random Stats and Weapons - Unlock new weapons and fight with random player upgrades as floors progress.
  • Boss Fights - Defeat strong bosses and climb to higher floors.
  • Leaderboards - Climb the ranks and get a top leaderboard score.
